process_message_stream: process a user message through the session processor and stream LLM output to the console
process_message_with_tools: process a message with auto-approve tool calls and display tool execution results in real time
process_message_with_images: process a message with attached images and stream the assistant response with token usage stats
process_message_compaction: process a message that triggers context compaction when the conversation exceeds token limits
process_message_error_handling: process a message and handle errors, warnings, and keyboard interrupts gracefully with status tracking
